untranslatable_reason: Belt Hold candle pattern detection requires specific candlestick shape recognition (specific wick/body ratios and positioning) not available in indicator list. Yearly high/low reference levels not available as indicators. Success rates, average rise/decline percentages, and volume trends marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source. Stop loss placement and target prices not specified by author.
translation_notes: Approximated upward breakout as close > Donchian upper and downward breakout as close < Donchian lower. Used generic body direction as proxy for Belt Hold formation. Exit condition based on 5-10 day deterioration note and 2% adverse return threshold. Pattern requires candlestick morphology analysis beyond available indicators.
